aljazeera.title: Iran reappoints a familiar face to powerful post during Khamenei funeral
Lebanon latest: Teacher killed by Israeli airstrike

monitor_the_situation.title: Israel Claims Killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei

— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 13h ago. Israeli Defense Minister Katz claims Israel assassinated Ali Khamenei, stating it was in response to his plans to destroy Israel and warning future Iranian leaders.
Teacher Killed by Israeli Airstrike in Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Beirut, Lebanon · 3h ago. An Israeli airstrike killed a teacher in Lebanon despite an existing ceasefire, continuing hostilities in the region.
Lebanon Estimates Direct War Damage from Israel at $3-4 Billion
— S3 · Economic · Lebanon · 6h ago. Lebanon's information minister stated that direct damage from the conflict with Israel is estimated at $3-4 billion, not including indirect losses.
